title: Soft Glow Ores
description: Vanilla ores emit a soft, cave-friendly glow for better visibility without flashy effects or noticeable lag. Fabric 1.20.1-1.21.11, works server-side or client-optional.
body:
# Soft Glow Ores

Soft Glow Ores makes vanilla ores easier to spot in dark caves by giving them a soft, balanced glow.

The mod is designed to look clean, stay lightweight, and work well on servers without adding heavy effects, ticking logic, or unnecessary complexity.

## Features

- Soft glow on vanilla ores
- Better cave visibility without harsh lighting
- Lightweight and performance-friendly
- Works in existing worlds
- Supports Fabric from 1.20.1 to 1.21.11
- Can be used on a server for all players
- Can also be installed only by a player for local use
- Works in singleplayer and dedicated servers

## Default Behavior

- Default light level: 7
- Preserves stronger vanilla light where needed
- Refreshes loaded chunks so older worlds update properly

## Supported Ores

- Coal Ore
- Copper Ore
- Iron Ore
- Gold Ore
- Redstone Ore
- Lapis Ore
- Emerald Ore
- Diamond Ore
- Nether Gold Ore
- Nether Quartz Ore
- Ancient Debris

## Performance

This mod does not use block entities, custom networking, or constant ticking logic. It is built to stay lightweight and server-friendly.

## Configuration

A config file is generated automatically:

`config/softglowores.json`

You can adjust:
- `lightLevel`
- `preserveHigherVanillaLight`
- `relightLoadedChunks`

## Compatibility

- Loader: Fabric
- Minecraft: 1.20.1 to 1.21.11
- Singleplayer: Yes
- Dedicated Server: Yes
- Client-only install: Yes
- Server-only install: Yes
